instructions: Review entries, then set include_on_site to true. Run: python scripts/generate_html.py

vulnerabilities.title: Microsoft SharePoint Server
vulnerabilities.name: Microsoft SharePoint Server Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Microsoft SharePoint Server contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability which allows an authorized attacker to execute code over a network.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Microsoft SharePoint Server contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability which allows an authorized...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
